[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0011111000 5
2 1100101011 6
3 0110011011 6
4 0011100010 4
5 0010111001 5
6 1000000110 3
7 1110000011 5

56 0000000100 1
67 0000000000 a match 0

72 1000000100 2
